channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Global microbiome atlas highlights missing microbes in UK infants' guts and probiotics

item.title: Pharmacy Closures Threaten Community Care Shift
item.description: Two thirds of pharmacies in England are operating at a loss, raising fears of service cuts and further closures, the NPA has warned. Medscape News UK

item.title: MPs Call for Immediate Ban on Brazilian Butt Lifts
item.description: MPs urge ministers to ban liquid Brazilian butt lifts, warning of deaths, âwild westâ practices, and delays in regulation. Press Association
